task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Machine backup retrieval

section.p: When the service organization is configured ( Service Master Data) to retrieve a backup on regular basis and the machine is connected to ORS, the list of backups can be found in the Backups section of product app.
The list of backups is by default sorted by date; top entry is the newest, bottom entry is the oldest.

note.p: Be aware sorting can change this.

section.p: In the printer version column the version related to the backup stored.
Select the backup you want to use and click 'Download backup' to retrieve the file to your local filesystem.
